description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Compare Genomic Change Annotation that runs on pushes to master and next-minor-release branches and on pull requests to these branches. For the oncokb/oncokb-annotator repository, set up a macOS job that checks out the code, installs Python 3.8, and then installs dependencies. Run linting with flake8, perform annotation using a script that involves downloading data from a GitHub repository, and compare the annotation results with those from the master branch.
